# Changelog

## 0.1.0

First public release of orxt.

<details>
<summary>Context</summary>

Initial release of all 16 sub-projects as orxt-* packages on PyPI, with BSL 1.1 license and npm CLI wrapper.

</details>

### Breaking

- **Breaking.** Standardized all package names to orxt-* prefix for PyPI publication.

### Features

- **New.** BSL 1.1 license and updated documentation.
- **New.** npm CLI wrapper package for installing the Python CLI via uv.
